query:
-- Verificar que el closetConfig fue copiado
SELECT id, quotationId, itemType, itemNumber, closetConfig 
FROM quotationItems 
WHERE quotationId IN ('4350001', '4380001')
AND itemType = 'closet';
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway03.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 2bxEETtHLyojAa4.root --database XhEkCr8yXcaeDFyuQebdJQ --execute 
-- Verificar que el closetConfig fue copiado
SELECT id, quotationId, itemType, itemNumber, closetConfig 
FROM quotationItems 
WHERE quotationId IN ('4350001', '4380001')
AND itemType = 'closet';
